node.text: Andrew shared a photo of the view from the top of the rock he climbed during the rock climbing class.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "rock climbing outdoor") on Session 8 (Score: 0.98)

node.text: Andrew recently took a rock climbing class and made it to the top, finding it challenging but satisfying.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "rock climbing outdoor") on Session 8 (Score: 0.98)

node.text: Andrew feels encouraged by the rock climbing experience to try more outdoor activities like kayaking and maybe bungee jumping.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "rock climbing outdoor") on Session 8 (Score: 0.98)

node.text: Andrew mentioned that he is a newbie at climbing but reached the top with the support and cheer from his friends.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "rock climbing outdoor") on Session 8 (Score: 0.98)

node.text: Andrew is looking forward to the hike and for Toby to meet Audrey's pups.
Andrew has plans for a hike next month and invited Audrey and her pups to join along.
Andrew mentioned feeling stressed due to work piling up and expressed a desire for the peace and freedom of going for a hike.
